summary: Completed frontend testing for TickBoom marketing landing page - verified all terminology changes from 'Evil' to 'Focus/Strict/TickBoom' and removal of punishing/guilt language. All 10 test cases passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All terminology changes verified successfully. Main page, About page, and Blog page tested. Key verifications: 1) No 'Evil' terminology in visible text (App Store URL slug is allowed), 2) No forbidden terms (brutal, ruthless, no mercy, etc.), 3) 'Strict Mode' feature visible with Lock icon and navigation blocking description, 4) 'Focus Countdown System' visible in Why Different section, 5) 'The TickBoom Philosophy' in HowItWorks (NOT Evil Philosophy), 6) 'The Focus Philosophy' on About page, 7) All main sections render correctly.

main_page.strict_mode_feature: PASS - Visible with Lock icon and correct description
main_page.focus_countdown_system: PASS - Visible in Why Different section
main_page.all_sections_render: PASS - Hero, Features, WhyDifferent, HowItWorks, Pricing, FAQ, Testimonials, CTA, Footer all render

blog_page.forbidden_terminology_check: PASS - No forbidden terms found including 'no mercy'
